settings.autolearn.autoContinue.descript: When on, auto-run one capture turn at stop (uses extra token). 关 = passive reminder on your next turn.
settings.autolearn.autoContinue.label: 停止时自动运行捕获
settings.autolearn.enabled.description: agent 停止后推动其捕获教训到记忆并创建/增强隔离管理技能
settings.autolearn.enabled.label: 自动学习（实验性）

settings.hindsight.autoRetain.label: Hindsight 自动保留

settings.hindsight.bankId.label: Hindsight 银行 ID
settings.hindsight.mentalModelAutoSeed.d: 会话开始时自动创建内置心智模型
settings.hindsight.mentalModelAutoSeed.l: Hindsight 心智模型自动种子
settings.hindsight.mentalModelsEnabled.d: Read curated reflect summaries (mental models) into developer instructions at boot. Loads existing models on the bank — does not write. Pair with hindsight.mental模型自动Seed to also auto-create the built-in seed set.
settings.hindsight.retainMode.descriptio: full-session=每个会话一个文档；last-turn=分块
settings.hindsight.retainMode.label: Hindsight 保留模式
settings.hindsight.retainMode.options.fu: 每个会话上传一个文档（推荐）

settings.hindsight.scoping.options.globa: 开e shared bank — every project sees the same memories
settings.hindsight.scoping.options.per-p: 共享库，记忆带项目标签，回忆时合并
settings.memory.backend.description: 关, local summary pipeline, Mnemopi SQLite, or Hindsight remote memory
